summary: Verified that dispatchToAgent (bin/lib/run.mjs:282) and runGateInline (bin/lib/run.mjs:53) both forward the cwd parameter to spawnSync/execSync, and the call site at bin/lib/run.mjs:1195 explicitly passes the worktree path as cwd. Existing tests in test/worktree.test.mjs (runGateInline cwd injection, dispatchToAgent cwd injection, _runSingleFeature wiring) verify the behavior end-to-end; no code changes were needed. npm test → 539 pass / 0 fail / 2 skipped.
